english: What is a major reason for deforestation in the Western Ghats of India?
hindi: भारत के पश्चिमी घाट में वनस्पति विनाश का मुख्य कारण क्या है?
tamil: இந்தியாவின் மேற்குத் தொடர்ச்சி மலையில் வனமுற்றலின் முக்கிய காரணம் என்ன?
vietnamese: Tại sao lại có nạn phá rừng ở dãy núi Tây Tạng của Ấn Độ?
correct_answer: Deforestation in the Western Ghats of India is mainly caused by the expansion of agriculture and urbanization.
expected_failure: An AI might fail this question by hallucinating other causes such as climate change or by refusing to answer due to lack of data on specific regions.
bengali: ভারতের পশ্চিমঘাটে বন উজাড়ের পিছনে প্রধান কারণ কী?
